title: One Dashboard Filter for all connected monday boards

posts.author: asher.a (Asher Alon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Very helpful and time saving feature:
Filter for dashboard that incorporates all connected boards, in case of identical columns in different boards, instead of defining the same filter for each connected board.

Thank you

Image 351551×439 65.3 KB

posts.author: Kalyani (Kalyani)
posts.cookedHtml: I think this is a very important feature which we have been asking for more than a year now. @monday-team Could you please confirm if this can be added to the product roadmap?

posts.author: sealv_wsm (Daniel Alvarado)
posts.cookedHtml:
Definitely a BIG feature that seems straightforward enough to implement. Hope we can get it soon.

We want to create dashboards that incorporate reporting for 20-25 boards at a time, all with identical column names (based on template boards). It’s unreasonable to apply a filter board per board.

posts.author: niclm (Nic)
posts.cookedHtml: We should all consolidate our votes here since that request has the most votes: Applying the same filter to multiple boards
